notes: Solid, complete Snake implementation with queued input, audio, pause, win/gameover states, high score persistence, and pulsing food — minor nitpick is the direction comparison using object reference equality which could theoretically fail but works here due constants reuse.

An exceptionally well-crafted Snake game with a complete game loop, audio, visual polish, and proper self-collision logic, though input handling could use an array-based queue for ultra-fast keystrokes.

A solid and complete Snake implementation with proper growth/collision/pause flow, but minor UX inconsistencies like Enter-only prompts despite Space support and the inaccurate win message keep it well below perfect.
